characters.name: Home
characters.description: TheMummies Alive! Wikiis about the short-lived animated series from 1997 of 42 episodes, produced from what used to be DIC Entertainment. In this wiki you will find information about everything related to the show, including the characters, episodes, universe, and the people behind it all!  There are currently469articles and over42,001files with even more coming on the way!

characters.name: Agent Phillips
characters.description: Agent PhillipsAppearancesFirst AppearanceWe've Got OneLast AppearanceWe've Got OneInformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAlliesThe General,Joe PendletonFoesThe MummiesPowersHigh military rankCurrent LocationAntarctica (presumably) Agent Phillipsworks as a Regional Sub-director for the Department of Federal Investigation. He analyzes and tires to learn all he can aboutRathonce the Mummy was captured while injured.

characters.name: Amanda Carnovan
characters.description: Amanda CarnovanAppearancesFirst AppearanceRa, Ra, Ra, RaLast AppearanceMy Dad the HeroInformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAlliesPresley Carnovan,Paul CarnovanFoesNonePowersNoneCurrent LocationSan FranciscoVoiced ByStevie VallanceGalleryGalleryAmanda Carnovan/Gallery Amanda Carnovanis the mother ofPresley Carnovan. Amanda is a middle-aged woman, with tanned skin, brown hair, and green eyes. She is mostly seen wearing a dark blueish green suit with a white shirt underneath, as well as a short skirt and heels of the same blueish green color. Amanda is kind and often contributes to causes that she believes in, such as saving important landmarks from being torn down. She is a loving and caring mother to her son Presley but has insecure feelings that he misses being with his father, who is away on business, and tries to bond with her son often.
characters.personality_section: Amanda is kind and often contributes to causes that she believes in, such as saving important landmarks from being torn down. She is a loving and caring mother to her son Presley but has insecure feelings that he misses being with his father, who is away on business, and tries to bond with her son often.

characters.name: Amenhotep
characters.description: —Amenhotep, toScarab,Pack to the Future AmenhotepPttFReunionBrother's KeeperAppearancesFirst AppearancePack to the FutureLast AppearanceBrother's KeeperInformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAlliesRapsesQueenTheMummiesRoyal GuardsFoesScarabArakhPowersLeadership SkillsInfluential and Political StrengthTracking and Hunting SkillsMagicKnowledgeCurrent LocationWestern Gate, deceasedVoiced ByUnknown QueenTheMummiesRoyal Guards Amenhotep appears stern, but also not unfair, and seems to be loved by his kingdom, as theMummiesspeak highly of him, even in the modern era, when he has no real power. He was obviously furious atScarabfor killing hisson, but he still gave him a fit punishment, without a fit of rage, showing his restrained character. Scarab's portrayal of Amenhotep largely kept the same personality traits, although appearing more impatient, as he wanted to reunite withPresley Carnovan, in order to steal his spirit.

characters.name: Ammut
characters.description: AmmutAppearancesFirst AppearancePack to the FutureLast AppearanceWho's WhoInformationSpeciesDeity, Devourer of SoulsGenderMaleAlliesScarabHekaFoesTheMummiesPowersEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilitySharp TeethSharp ClawsSoul Devouring (possibly)Current LocationSan FranciscoGalleryGalleryAmmut/Gallery Heka Enhanced DurabilitySharp TeethSharp ClawsSoul Devouring (possibly) Ammut acts very much the same way as any normal, mortal dog would. He's curious and has the same wants and needs as any dog. However he is not the brightest of the bunch, and somewhat cowardly as well. Despite that, he is always ready to defendScaraband attack anyone against him.

characters.name: Announcer
characters.description: AnnouncerAppearancesFirst AppearanceBody SlamLast AppearanceBody SlamInformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAlliesNoneFoesNonePowersNoneCurrent LocationSan FranciscoVoiced ByScott McNeil  TheAnnounceris a minor character that appeared inBody Slam. The Announcer acts like a typical boxing announcer, introducing the fighters with creative comments and a lot of enthusiasm, as well as commentating on the matches.

characters.name: Annoyed Scholar
characters.description: The title of this article is adescriptivename givenby thewikiand is notAnnoyed Scholar's official name. Annoyed ScholarAppearancesFirst AppearanceThe Prince and the PresleyLast AppearanceThe Prince and the PresleyInformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAlliesNoneFoesRathPowersNoneCurrent LocationSan Francisco  The scholar seems to have an interest in learning new facts, most likely aboutancientEgypt. He is however annoyed by people who talk and interrupt during lectures.

characters.name: Anubis
characters.description: AnubisAppearancesFirst AppearancePack to the FutureLast AppearanceBrother's Keeper(Final on-screen appearance)New Mummy in Town(Mentioned).InformationSpeciesDeityof the UnderworldGenderMaleAlliesSet,Trackers of Souls,ScarabFoesThe Mummies,The Eye Of Darkness,Scarab(formerly)PowersEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityEnhanced Sense of SmellLevitationMagicKnowledgeWeapon ManifestationNecromancyEnhanced Intellect (briefly)Via Staff:Energy BlastsSleep InducementAnimationTeleportationCurrent LocationWestern Gate (Realm)Voiced ByBlu MankumaGalleryGalleryAnubis/Gallery New Mummy in Town(Mentioned). Enhanced DurabilityEnhanced Sense of SmellLevitationMagicKnowledgeWeapon ManifestationNecromancyEnhanced Intellect (briefly)Via Staff:Energy BlastsSleep InducementAnimationTeleportation Anubis is shown to be somewhat playful and naive, in comparison to his associate, Set, who is serious and does not take kindly to being defeated. Anubis is loyal to Set and tries to imitate him in order to appear more threatning. Anubis is also a cunning warrior. However, he is also very clumsy, leading to him and the people around him (mostly Set) to get hurt in some way.

characters.name: Apep
characters.description: ApepDeityHumanAppearancesFirst AppearancePack to the Future(Mentioned)Desert Chic(First Appearance).Last AppearancePepped with Good Intention(Last Appearance)Show Me the Mummy(Stock Footage).InformationSpeciesDeity/Demon, Human (Disguise)GenderMaleAlliesDesert PrincesScarab(formerly)NefertinaFoesTheMummies(formerly)ScarabPowersEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabiltyShapeshiftingElasticityFire BreathingMagicKnowledgeCurrent LocationWestern GateVoiced ByJason Gray-StanfordGalleryGalleryApep/Gallery Scarab(formerly)Nefertina Scarab Apep is a violent force, not hesitating to harm anyone to get what he wants. Apep is, however, a good leader, leading the Desert Princes. Apep is also a liar and a trickster, shown to lie about his true intentions and plans. Despite that, Apep is also seen showing respect, compassion and love for people, specifically Nefertina, falling in love with her. Apep has also shown that he is capable of doing good, saving both Nefertina from certain death, as well as Presley himself from the hands of Scarab, despite their history.

characters.name: Arakh
characters.description: ArakhMummyArmoredAppearancesFirst AppearanceBrother's KeeperLast AppearanceThe Heart's ArrowInformationSpeciesHuman/MummyGenderMaleAlliesScarab,Kimas(formerly)FoesJa-Kal, theMummies,KimasPowersHunting SkillsHand to Hand Combat SkillsSpear and Dagger UsageUncertain:Bandage Manipulation (Possibly)Fright-Sight(Possibly)Via theScorpion Charm:Scorpion ArmorEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityStinger AppendageClaw ArmLaser BeamsCurrent LocationBeyond theWestern GateVoiced ByScott McNeil Hand to Hand Combat SkillsSpear and Dagger UsageUncertain:Bandage Manipulation (Possibly)Fright-Sight(Possibly)Via theScorpion Charm:Scorpion ArmorEnhanced StrengthEnhanced DurabilityStinger AppendageClaw ArmLaser Beams  Arakh was always a very spiteful and jealous person. Since he was young, he was jealous of his brother's achievements. Arakh is also very evil, twisting the truth for his own advantage, and looking to do anything in his path for his own benefit, regardless of morals. He hasn't even be shown to care much about his own son's well being and opinion, unless it serves him in some way. He is also quick to anger and is driven by his need for vengeance, often times without thinking of the consequences of his actions, such as when he fought Ja-Kal, knowing full well he wouldn't be able to recharge later without his sarcophagus.

He acts as a typical referee, although at times confused or distraught over the unusual or supernatural course the matches were taking.

characters.name: Armon
characters.description: —Armon, toJa-Kal,Dog Bites Mummy ArmonMummyArmoredAppearancesFirst AppearanceRa, Ra, Ra, RaLast AppearanceShow Me the MummyInformationSpeciesHuman/MummyGenderMaleAlliesTheMummies,Presley CarnovanFoesScarabPowersArmon possesses magical armor resembling a ram that enhances his strength and durability, gains a golden arm to replace the one he previously lost in battle, which can also morph into a drill, and is skilled in Egypt-TsuCurrent LocationSan FranciscoVoiced ByGraeme KingstonGalleryGalleryArmon/Gallery Armonwas a warrior in thepharaoh'sarmy. After his death, his duties lie with protectingPresley Carnovan,Prince Rapses' reincarnation. Armon is a gentle giant. He loves to fight, and enjoys spending time watching television, which he refers to as "the Magic Box". Armon also enjoys training Presley into the art of Egypt-Tsu, wanting to turn him into a great warrior, like himself. Armon also has quite a big stomach, and is shown to greatly enjoy food, especially "Beefy Burgers" from the local fast food chain which goes by the same name. Armon has been portrayed as "playfully naive". He may not be the sharpest one of the Mummies, as he often chooses to punch his way through a problem than to solve it peacefully, but his naiveness has often resulted in the solution of many issues encountered by the Mummies, as he often finds a simpler way to solve a problem. However, Armon feels sad when he is weak, because he doubts his strength, and wants to prove to himself that he can still fight. Armon also has a great emotional (and physical) attachment to his golden arm, which was a gift from the Pharaoh to him, after he lost his real arm in a previous battle. When his golden arm was removed and stolen by undead gold miners, it caused him great emotional pain. Armon also often engages in arguments with Rath, as Rath is the voice of logic in the group, while Armon chooses to fight first and ask questions later, bringing up a "brains vs brawns" argument throughout the series. Despite these flaws, Armon always stands by his friends, and will always try to help them, no matter the cost.

Despite these flaws, Armon always stands by his friends, and will always try to help them, no matter the cost.

characters.name: Armon's Mom
characters.description: Armon's MomAppearancesFirst AppearanceEye of the BeholderLast AppearanceEye of the BeholderInformationSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleAlliesArmonFoesNonePowersNo supernatural abilites, but excellent cooking skills.Current LocationBeyond the Western Gate.  Armon's Momis an unnamed character that briefly appeared in the episodeEye of the Beholder. Armon's Mom appears as a kind woman who is concerned about her son, as well as his diet, insisting that he should eat more because he is nothing than "skin and bones". Armon seems to also hold great admiration and respect for her.
characters.personality_section: Armon's Mom appears as a kind woman who is concerned about her son, as well as his diet, insisting that he should eat more because he is nothing than "skin and bones". Armon seems to also hold great admiration and respect for her.

characters.name: Armon's Mom

Armon seems to also hold great admiration and respect for her.

characters.name: Bastet
characters.description: BastetAppearancesFirst AppearancePawsLast AppearancePawsInformationSpeciesGoddess of CatsGenderFemaleAlliesNefertina(formerly)FoesTheMummiesPresley CarnovanPowersInherit:Sharp ClawsThroughMagic:Feline ControlPower TransferSleeping PowderLaser/Fireball BlastsObject ManifestationForce FieldsMagic/Energy TransferInEthereal Form:TeleportationLevitationCurrent LocationWestern Gate(Possibly)Voiced ByKathleen Barr Presley Carnovan Sharp ClawsThroughMagic:Feline ControlPower TransferSleeping PowderLaser/Fireball BlastsObject ManifestationForce FieldsMagic/Energy TransferInEthereal Form:TeleportationLevitation Bastet was described as initially being a reveredgoddess. We know that she used to be good, not only because people admired her, but also because she helped in the creation of theAmulets of Ra, beingNefertina's patron goddess. However, after all these years, something changed in her. In the episode, she is furious over the lack of worshippers, and threatens to kill thepharaoh, to regain her followers. Therefore, we can assume Bastet is desperate for attention, and will stop at nothing to be worshipped.

characters.name: Benny
characters.description: BennyAppearancesFirst AppearanceKid ScarabLast AppearanceShow Me the Mummy(Stock Footage)InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAlliesCynthia LuFoesNonePowersNoneCurrent LocationSan Francisco  Benny(akaBenjamin) is the tour guide for theACME Bakery. Benny seems like a calm and easy-going person. When the Dough Monster attacked the factory workers, he didn't seem too anxious and was level-headed. He also seems excited to talk about bread and the bakery, despite his monotonous voice.

characters.name: Bes
characters.description: BesAppearancesFirst AppearanceTree O'Clock RockLast AppearanceWho's WhoInformationSpeciesSpirit of Luck and MischiefGenderMaleAlliesScarab(formerly)FoesThe Mummies,ScarabPowersTeleportationMatter ManipulationTelekinesisMagicCurrent LocationBeyond the Western Gate Besis a short and mischievous, green-skinned humanoid creature who enjoys playing games and pulling pranks on people. He especially enjoys flipping acointo decide on the outcome of all of his choices and decisions. Bes is short and has green skin. He also appears as slightly chubby. He was warts on his face and purple eyes. He wears a purple hat with two gold stripes and a large magenta gem in the middle, a golden collar around his neck and shoulders, a gold armband on his left arm, and golden wristbands on both arms. He wears a purple cloth that extends from his chest to his waist, and turns into a skirt and loincloth, and finally, he wears a golden band around each ankle and purple slippers. Bes is mischievous and enjoys causing chaos for those around him, often in the form of flipping a coin of his that decides his next action.
characters.personality_section: Bes is mischievous and enjoys causing chaos for those around him, often in the form of flipping a coin of his that decides his next action.

characters.name: Bix Bingsley
characters.description: Bix BingsleyAppearancesFirst AppearanceTrue BelieverLast AppearanceShow Me the Mummy(Voice Only)InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAlliesNefertinaFoesScarabPowersNoneCurrent LocationSan Francisco Bix Bingsleyis a clumsy, glasses-wearing sales clerk who sells clothes but is allergic to wool. The Mummies buy clothes to better blend in with the people. Where Bix andNefer-Tinameet, Bix quickly became infatuated with Nefer-Tina and asked her out on a date. Nefer-Tina was flattered and the pair got along well. Outside the store, theShabtiattacked, Bix was injured and Nefer-Tina and the Mummies took him to the hospital. He works at a clothes store named "Naxx."

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: BobAppearancesFirst AppearanceDead Man WalkingLast AppearanceShow Me the Mummy(Voice only)InformationSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAlliesJoe PendletonFoesNonePowersNoneCurrent LocationSan Francisco Bobis a rotund police officer of the San Francisco Police Department andJoe Pendleton's partner. Bob has peachy skin, blue eyes, and ginger hair (though on occasion its also seen as black or grey). He wears a blue police uniform with a grey tie and a circular golden emblem on his hat. He is also notably overweight. Bob appears to be a simple man, he enjoys donuts and coffee, as well as hanging out with his pal,Joe, even if he doesn't share his passion for the paranormal and supernatural, thinking its silly. He also enjoys monster trucks. Bob doesn't seem that competent at his job, losing his cool fairly easily and disliking being stuck on night patrol (which he attributes to Joe's behavior and beliefs of the paranormal).

characters.name: Boss Ghoul
characters.description: Boss GhoulAppearancesFirst AppearanceThe Bird-Mummy of AlcatrazLast AppearanceThe Bird-Mummy of AlcatrazInformationSpeciesGhoulGenderMaleAlliesGhouls,ScarabFoesThe MummiesPowersIntangibility, FlightCurrent LocationAlcatraz Island(Possibly)  TheBoss Ghoulis aghoulthat appeared in the episodeThe Bird-Mummy of Alcatraz. The Boss Ghoul acts like a typical mafia boss, with a stereotypical New York accent. He commands the other ghouls and prefers to stay back and let them do the work. However, Scarab's strength and threat caused him to act more cowardly and let him be in charge.
